proofGridItems.title: See every agent in one feed
proofGridItems.body: Track real-time status, assignment changes, and execution context without terminal-hopping.

proofGridItems.title: Move work from inbox to done

proofGridItems.footnote: Shared task state, clear ownership, predictable execution.

proofGridItems.title: Ship with safer operational visibility
proofGridItems.body: Live events, role-aware controls, and deterministic setup workflows keep the system transparent.
proofGridItems.footnote: Built for Public WSS and self-hosted launch.

explainerBlocks.title: Connect once, operate continuously

marketing.heroSubheadline: Coordinate agents, tasks, and live activity through one operating surface built for Public WSS and BYO OpenClaw teams.
marketing.snapshotNoteBody: Connect your OpenClaw instance, book a setup call, and you're running mission control.
marketing.productInActionSubtitle: Built for teams running OpenClaw in production

visualCards.title: Agent Dashboard
visualCards.caption: See every agent's status, current task, model usage, and cost at a glance.

visualCards.title: Kanban Board
visualCards.caption: Manage tasks across agents with a drag-and-drop board. Assign, track, and ship.

visualCards.title: Live Activity Feed
visualCards.caption: Real-time stream of agent actions, task changes, and system events.

marketing.operatorFlowBody: We'll personally get you set up on a call. Connect your OpenClaw instance, configure your agents, and you'll have a full mission control dashboard running in under an hour.
marketing.whyHeadline: OpenClaw is powerful. Running it shouldn't be painful.
marketing.whyBody: OpenClaw gives you incredible AI agent capabilities. But without a proper dashboard, you're flying blind — checking logs in terminals, guessing costs, and context-switching constantly. Synclaw is the mission control layer you've been missing.
whyBullets: Real-time agent status and health monitoring
Kanban task management built for AI workflows
Secure encrypted connections to your OpenClaw instance
Full activity audit log with 7-day retention

segmentCards.title: Individual Developers
segmentCards.text: Running OpenClaw solo? Get a proper dashboard without building one yourself.

segmentCards.title: Small Teams
segmentCards.text: Share mission control across your team with role-based access and collaboration tools.

segmentCards.title: Production Workloads
segmentCards.text: Monitor costs, track agent health, and catch issues before they become incidents.

marketing.trialSummary: For technical users who want full control. Full codebase, community support, self-hosted infrastructure.
